summary: Comprehensive testing of Patent Dashboard completed after major refactoring. Backend APIs fully functional (100% success rate). Frontend UI excellent with strict B&W design compliance. One remaining issue with 'International Classification' text in applicants and minor React key warnings.

integration_issues.issue: 'International Classification' text still appears in applicants despite backend fix

design_issues.issue: Multiple React key warnings for state elements with duplicate keys

passed_tests: Backend health check returns correct status (5622 patents, 1470 MEGA)
All 10 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Journal list API returns 301 journals correctly
Patents API returns 5622 patents with proper filtering
MEGA patents API returns 1470 patents (score ≥ 65)
Statistics API working with correct metrics
Technology fields API returns 29 fields
Welcome modal displays with proper B&W styling
Metrics bar shows correct stats (Total: 5622, MEGA: 1470, Avg Score: 49, Cities: 14, Claims: 12)
Journals panel lists 301 journals with proper status indicators
India map renders in grayscale with 8 city pins and white halo
Technology density uses opacity-only heatmap (12 fields)
Patents list displays 500 items with working search and sort
Patent detail drawer opens and displays full information correctly
MEGA only toggle filters patents correctly
Search functionality works ('system' search returns results)
No green colors (#16a34a) found anywhere in UI
No emojis found in text content
All interactive elements have proper hover states (grayscale only)
Strict B&W design compliance maintained throughout

medium_priority: Fix 'International Classification' text still appearing in applicants - backend services.py line 358 filter may not be working correctly
Fix React key warnings for state elements (duplicate keys: state-undefined)
action_item_for_main_agent.notes: Excellent work on the major refactoring! The strict B&W design is perfectly implemented. All core functionality works flawlessly. The modular component structure is clean and maintainable. Only minor issues remain with applicant text filtering and React keys.
